case_title: JUDITH A. KERR VS. RYAN CUNNINGHAM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY KERR, JUDITH A. AS TO DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE) SERVED OCT-24-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, RYAN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-23-2012 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED HEARING SO THAT PLAINTIFF CAN PROVIDE ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTATION OF LOANS TO DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KERR, JUDITH A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, RYAN $2,679.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,754.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, RYAN HEARING SET FOR AUG-27-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-13-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR KERR, JUDITH A. ASSIGNED TO VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $700.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, RYAN
